nodes.label: orion-rdf-writer: constructs the Knowledge Graph by converting incoming bus events into RDF triples via RdfStoreClient (graphdb/fuseki/generic/rdf4j backends)

nodes.community_name: orion-rdf-store: operator/deployment stack for Orion's primary RDF datastore (Apache Jena Fuseki); not a Python service, no app/settings.py/requirements.txt
